title: St. Moritz, Graubünden — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to St. Moritz, Graubünden: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

St. Moritz is a city in Graubünden with a population of 5,000. The world-famous Alpine resort in the Engadin valley, host of two Winter Olympics, known for its luxury hotels, frozen lake polo, and the legendary Cresta Run.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
